nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point for OriStudio frontend SPA, mounting the Vue 3 application via /src/main.ts with Oklch-based design tokens for background and text colors.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Frontend project manifest defining Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite stack with Naive UI, ECharts, Axios, and Vitest test framework as core dependencies.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration targeting ES2021 with strict mode, Bundler module resolution, Vue JSX preservation, and path alias @/ pointing to src/.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: Node-side TypeScript configuration for Vite and Tailwind config files, using ESNext module resolution with bundler strategy.
